final:
module top_module(
	input             clk, resetn,

	input [31:0]      pcpi_rs2,
        input             divs,
	output reg [62:0] divisor
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
	   divisor <= (divs && pcpi_rs2[31] ? -pcpi_rs2 : pcpi_rs2) << 31;
	end
   
endmodule
